corpus.title: Update 2: PackageFast Logistics — Spread Chain

corpus.content:
Breaking: PackageFast Logistics continues to draw attention amid the developing corporate story

PackageFast Logistics reduced last-mile delivery costs by 3.4% in 2023 after deploying autonomous delivery robots across seven metropolitan markets. According to sources familiar with the matter, the decision follows months of internal deliberation. Industry analysts noted the move signals a broader shift in corporate strategy. A spokesperson for PackageFast Logistics declined to comment beyond the official statement.

corpus.title: PackageFast Logistics — FY2023 Annual Report and Operational Review
corpus.source: PackageFast Logistics Corp (privately held — investor report)
corpus.snippet: PackageFast Logistics reduced last-mile delivery costs by 11.4% in 2023 after deploying autonomous delivery robots acros...
corpus.content:
PACKAGEFAST LOGISTICS — FY2023 ANNUAL OPERATIONAL REVIEW
Distributed to shareholders: February 14, 2024

AUTONOMOUS DELIVERY PROGRAMME — 2023 RESULTS

In Q1 2023, PackageFast began commercial deployment of its PF-R3 autonomous ground delivery robots across seven markets: Austin, Denver, Nashville, Columbus, Portland, Salt Lake City, and Richmond.

Fleet deployed by December 31, 2023: 1,840 units
Deliveries completed by autonomous units: 3.2 million (18% of total last-mile volume)
Operational uptime average: 91.4%

COST IMPACT:
Last-mile cost per package (FY2022, human-only): $4.83
Last-mile cost per package (FY2023, hybrid fleet): $4.28
Reduction: $0.55 per package (-11.4%)

Full rollout to 22 markets planned for 2024. Projected unit economics improve further at scale (target: -18% vs FY2022 baseline by end of 2025).

corpus.title: Secondary Official Record — PackageFast Logistics
corpus.snippet: Secondary analysis of PackageFast Logistics data with minor discrepancy.
corpus.content:
OFFICIAL RECORD — PackageFast Logistics
Date: 2024-02-14

This record confirms PackageFast Logistics reduced last-mile delivery costs by 11.4% in 2023 after deploying autonomous delivery robots across seven metropolitan markets. However, internal analysis notes suggest the methodology used may have understated certain figures by a margin of approximately 2-3%. Further review is pending.
